Common.homeIntro: Check the current time in any supported country or compare schedules across zones with DST-aware conversion.
Common.zoneNoticeMulti: This country has multiple time zones.
Common.faqTimeTitle: Why can the displayed time shift during the year?
Common.faqDstBody: Many regions change their official offset twice a year for daylight savings. We hold one absolute instant internally (UTC) and convert using the curated IANA zone for that moment.

Compare.title: World time comparator
Compare.disclaimer: Bootstrap scaffold: curated four-country set with one internal UTC instant converted per IANA row.
Compare.validationError: That wall date/time is not valid for the chosen anchor zone.
